scripts.build: parcel build src/index.html && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path sitemap.xml -Destination dist/sitemap.xml" && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path robots.txt -Destination dist/robots.txt" && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path src/images/logo-2.png -Destination dist/logo-2.png"
scripts.build-gh: parcel build src/index.html --public-url "/" && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path sitemap.xml -Destination dist/sitemap.xml" && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path robots.txt -Destination dist/robots.txt" && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path src/images/logo-2.png -Destination dist/logo-2.png" && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path dist/index.html -Destination dist/404.html" && powershell -Command "Set-Content -Path dist/CNAME -Value 'youthsportsclubtogo.com'"
